ink-black.$description: Ink Black — Primary text, nav text, body copy, image borders, dominant foreground on white canvas

paper-white.$description: Paper White — Page background, image backgrounds, the base surface every section sits on

stone-border.$description: Stone Border — Warm hairline dividers, image borders, subtle structural lines — the only neutral that carries a paper-warm tint

pure-black.$description: Pure Black — Icon fills, absolute contrast moments in illustration shadows

stamp-blue.$description: Stamp Blue — DT logo badge fill and link/nav border — a pure, unmoderated blue that acts as the only brand mark, used sparingly as a square stamp in the header

indigo-link.$description: Indigo Link — Underlined link text and link borders throughout body copy and project entries — the workhorse interactive color

navy-deep.$description: Navy Deep — Drop shadow tone beneath illustration blocks — the darkest blue in the gradient stack

cobalt-mid.$description: Cobalt Mid — Mid-tone blue in the Stripe illustration gradient stack

sky-bright.$description: Sky Bright — Brighter blue in the Stripe illustration gradient, adjacent to the mid-tone

amber-flow.$description: Amber Flow — Yellow stroke for the flowing curved arrows in the Stripe illustration

tangerine-arc.$description: Tangerine Arc — Orange stroke for the secondary flowing arrows in the Stripe illustration

ember-link.$description: Ember Link — Rare warm-orange link variant for cross-section references

apple-system.$description: Entire site — system stack used unapologetically as the brand voice. Body text at 400, section headings at 700 large, inline emphasis at 600. The refusal to load a webfont is the signature: the portfolio reads like a native document, not a designed artifact.

paper-white.$description: Surface level 0: Page canvas — the single base surface every section shares
